task.title: Installing the Product
task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to install the product on your system.

prereq.p: Before you begin, ensure that your system meets the minimum requirements.

step.cmd: Download the installer package from the release page.

info.p: Choose the package that matches your operating system architecture.

step.cmd: Extract the archive to your preferred installation directory.
Verify the installation by checking the version.

result.p: The product is now installed and ready for use. See the product overview for next steps.
